user.title: Impulse Counter Setup
user.description: Configure a water or gas meter using a magnetic contact sensor.

data_description.meter_name: E.g. Cold Water Meter, Kitchen Gas Meter
data_description.source_entity: Magnetic sensor connected to the physical meter
data_description.multiplier: How many pulses = 1 m³ (printed on the meter)
data_description.initial_value: Current reading on physical meter (0 if new)

abort.no_binary_sensors: No binary sensors found in Home Assistant.

init.title: Manage meter: {meter_name}
init.description: What would you like to do?

edit_config.title: Edit configuration — {meter_name}
edit_config.description:
Change the contact sensor or calculation parameters.

Current sensor: `{current_entity}`

data_description.source_entity: Select the new magnetic sensor (e.g. if replaced)
data_description.multiplier: How many pulses = 1 m³ (printed on meter)

adjust_index.title: Adjust index — {meter_name}
adjust_index.description:
Use this if the sensor was disconnected and the counter drifted from the physical meter.

**Current HA reading:** {current_reading} m³

Enter the actual value from the physical meter. Recorded pulses are **preserved**, only the offset changes.

reset_counter.title: Full reset — {meter_name}
reset_counter.description:
⚠️ Use this option **only when replacing the physical meter**.

All recorded pulses will be **deleted**. Enter the starting index of the new meter (usually 0).

Current sensor: `{current_entity}`

data.confirm_reset: I confirm I want to fully reset the counter

error.invalid_value: The entered value is not valid.
error.must_confirm: You must check the confirmation box to reset the counter.
